title: 1Stop
description: A single portal that unifies campus services — bookings, tickets, and announcements — behind one type-safe Next.js app with server-rendered pages and a Postgres-backed API.

title: BlogBubble
tagline: Minimal markdown blogging with realtime comments
description: A lightweight blogging platform: write in markdown, publish instantly, and get realtime comment threads over WebSockets. Built on React and a Node/Express backend with MongoDB.

title: E-commerce API
description: A production-shaped REST API for e-commerce: catalog, cart, orders, and auth, with Redis caching and Docker-based deploys. Rate-limited, tested, and documented.
